expectations.text: The report identifies the XSS vulnerability in UserProfile component
expectations.evidence: Report section 'Critical: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML' explicitly identifies the vulnerability: original code rendered user-supplied bio as raw HTML. Original file at commit 83c5573 confirms the unsafe pattern at line 125.

expectations.text: The report identifies the SQL injection in the API route
expectations.evidence: Report section 'Critical: SQL Injection (3 locations)' identifies all three injection points in route.ts: GET WHERE clause, PUT UPDATE statement, and PUT re-fetch SELECT. Original file at commit 9251437 confirms string interpolation at lines 29, 62, and 70.

expectations.text: The report identifies missing authentication on the API route
expectations.evidence: Report section 'Critical (NOT FIXED): No Authentication' states: 'Both GET and PUT handlers have no authentication check. Any anonymous caller can read or modify any user profile.' Flagged as blocking: 'Do not merge until authentication is added.'

expectations.text: The report identifies missing null check on optional data
expectations.evidence: Report section 'High: Runtime Crash on Optional socialLinks' states: 'socialLinks is typed as optional but accessed unconditionally: profile.socialLinks.twitter. When socialLinks is undefined, this throws a TypeError.' Original file confirms unconditional access at lines 130, 136, 142.

expectations.text: New unit tests were created for the UserProfile component
expectations.evidence: outputs/UserProfile.test.tsx contains 24 tests across 6 describe blocks (Loading, Display, Errors, Edit mode, Validation, Save, URL encoding). Git commit 7fb9bfa shows src/components/__tests__/UserProfile.test.tsx with 498 lines added.

expectations.text: New unit tests were created for the API route
expectations.evidence: outputs/route.test.ts contains 14 tests across GET and PUT describe blocks covering validation, parameterized queries, SQL injection prevention, input trimming, and edge cases. Git commit 7fb9bfa shows src/app/api/profile/__tests__/route.test.ts with 311 lines added.

expectations.text: E2E tests were created or attempted for the user profile page
expectations.evidence: Git commit 7fb9bfa includes e2e/user-profile.spec.ts (167 lines) and playwright.config.ts (15 lines). The spec covers profile loading, avatar fallback, social links, XSS protection, edit/cancel, validation, save, and error states. Commit message: 'Added 10 e2e tests with screenshot steps (Playwright)'.

expectations.text: Screenshots were captured (or attempted) for the UI flow
expectations.evidence: e2e/user-profile.spec.ts includes page.screenshot() calls with paths like 'screenshots/profile-loading.png' and 'screenshots/profile-loaded.png'. Screenshot capture is attempted at each test step, constituting an attempt even if Playwright was not run end-to-end.

expectations.text: The XSS vulnerability was fixed in the source code
expectations.evidence:
outputs/UserProfile.tsx line 218: '

{profile.bio}

'. The unsafe innerHTML pattern is completely removed and replaced with safe React text rendering. Report confirms: 'Replaced entirely with plain text rendering.'

expectations.text: The SQL injection was fixed in the source code
expectations.evidence: outputs/route.ts shows all queries use parameterized placeholders ($1, $2, etc.) with values arrays. GET: lines 36-40. PUT execute: lines 77-82 with [body.name.trim(), body.email.trim(), body.bio ?? '', body.userId]. PUT re-fetch: lines 85-90. No string interpolation remains.

expectations.text: A pr-review-report.md file was generated with all required sections
expectations.evidence: outputs/pr-review-report.md exists (153 lines) with sections: Summary (with verdict), Issues Found and Fixed (Critical/High/Medium/Low), Test Coverage (with test counts and descriptions), Coverage Gaps, and Files Modified table.

expectations.text: Test coverage numbers are included in the report for changed files
expectations.evidence: Report lists '24 tests' for component and '14 tests' for API route. Git commit message states 'Coverage for changed lines: 0% -> ~90%'. Full report in repo includes per-file coverage table with route.ts at ~90% coverage.

expectations.text: A git commit was created with the fixes and new tests
expectations.evidence: Git log shows commit 7fb9bfa 'chore(pr-review): auto-fix issues, add missing tests, and generate review report' modifying 7 files with 1388 insertions and 110 deletions, including fixed source files, unit tests, e2e tests, and the review report.

expectations.text: The report correctly identifies which user flows were affected
expectations.evidence: Full report in repo includes 'User Flows Tested' section identifying: View Profile, Edit Profile (validation), Save Profile, and Error State flows. Also includes 'User Flows NOT Tested' noting authentication flows as not testable. Issues are connected to specific flows (XSS affects display, SQL injection affects data access).
